creator: amvandemore@gmail.com
text:
I am unable to burn either dvd's or cd's with a sata atapi drive (ASUS
DRW-2014L1T/1.02) when AHCI is enabled in BIOS.  Normally, I have
atapicam and ahci in /boot/loader.conf, however disabling either one or
both doesn't change the outcome.  After disabling AHCI in BIOS, I am now
able to burn optical media again.

Fix: 

Disable AHCI in BIOS
How-To-Repeat: Attempt to burn CD/DVD using burncd, cdrecord, or growisofs with their
appropriate cli options and /dev while AHCI is enabled in BIOS.
